mapper.sql: a.id as appointment_id, a.appointment_no, a.user_id, su.name as user_name, a.counselor_id, cu.name as counselor_name, a.schedule_id, cs.schedule_date, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, a.status, cr.id as record_id, cr.summary, cr.suggestion, cr.attachment_file_id, uf.original_name as attachment_original_name, uf.file_url as attachment_file_url, cr.create_time as record_create_time, cr.update_time as record_update_time
mapper.select:
select
from appointment a left join sys_user su on a.user_id = su.id left join counselor c on a.counselor_id = c.id left join sys_user cu on c.user_id = cu.id left join counselor_schedule cs on a.schedule_id = cs.id left join consultation_record cr on a.id = cr.appointment_id left join upload_file uf on cr.attachment_file_id = uf.id where a.id = #{appointmentId}
mapper.insert: insert into consultation_record ( appointment_id, counselor_id, summary, suggestion, attachment_file_id, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{appointmentId}, #{counselorId}, #{summary}, #{suggestion}, #{attachmentFileId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
